data.description: Find out the latest shipping costs from China to Morocco, including sea freight, air freight, and door-to-door (DDP) options. Compare transit times and get expert tips for cost-effective shipping.

As a key logistics hub in North Africa, Morocco’s ports and airports facilitate efficient trade between China and the African and European markets.</p><p data-start="389" data-end="662">For businesses and importers looking to optimize shipping costs and transit times, choosing the right shipping method is crucial. Depending on cargo size, urgency, and budget, companies can opt for sea freight, air freight, or door-to-door (DDP) shipping.</p><ul data-start="664" data-end="1130"><li data-start="664" data-end="775"><a class="nturl" href="https://www.tonlexing.com/sea-freight-shipping-from-china/"><span style="color: #ff9900;">Sea freight</span> </a>is the most cost-effective option for large shipments but has longer transit times.</li><li data-start="776" data-end="899"><a class="nturl" href="https://www.tonlexing.com/air-freight-from-china/"><span style="color: #ff9900;">Air freight</span> </a>is the fastest method, ideal for urgent or high-value goods, though it comes at a higher price.</li><li data-start="900" data-end="1130"><a class="nturl" href="https://www.tonlexing.com/ddp-shipping-from-china/"><span style="color: #ff9900;">DDP shipping</span></a> is a hassle-free logistics solution, where freight forwarders handle customs clearance, import duties, and last-mile delivery, making it the best choice for small businesses and e-commerce sellers.</li></ul><p data-start="1132" data-end="1438" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Shipping costs <a class="nturl" href="https://www.tonlexing.com/shipping-from-china-to-morocco/"><span style="color: #ff9900;">from China to Morocco</span></a> depend on several factors, including freight method, cargo weight, customs fees, and seasonal demand. This guide provides detailed pricing estimates, transit times, and strategies to help you choose the most efficient and cost-effective shipping option.</p></div></div><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-dbbdf2c e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="dbbdf2c" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{"ekit_has_onepagescroll_dot":"yes"}"><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-59e254e elementor-widget elementor-widget-image" data-id="59e254e" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{"ekit_we_effect_on":"none"}" data-widget_type="image.default">

</details></div></div></div></div><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-791092b e-flex e-con-boxed e-con e-parent" data-id="791092b" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{"ekit_has_onepagescroll_dot":"yes"}"><div class="e-con-inner"><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-eb9a32a e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="eb9a32a" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{"ekit_has_onepagescroll_dot":"yes"}"><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2d1e27b e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="2d1e27b" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{"ekit_has_onepagescroll_dot":"yes"}"><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-7b9003b elementor-widget elementor-widget-heading" data-id="7b9003b" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" id="1" data-settings="{"ekit_we_effect_on":"none"}" data-widget_type="heading.default"><h3 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Factors Affecting Shipping Costs from China to Morocco</h3></div></div><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-ead54fc e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="ead54fc" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{"ekit_has_onepagescroll_dot":"yes"}"><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5aae4ce elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor" data-id="5aae4ce" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{"ekit_we_effect_on":"none"}" data-widget_type="text-editor.default"><p data-start="66" data-end="380">Shipping costs from China to Morocco fluctuate due to multiple economic, logistical, and regulatory factors. Understanding these elements can help businesses optimize shipping strategies, reduce costs, and avoid unexpected expenses. Below are the key factors that impact shipping rates and transit times.</p><h4 data-start="387" data-end="467"><strong data-start="391" data-end="465">Shipping Method: Choosing Between Sea Freight, Air Freight, and DDP</strong></h4><p data-start="468" data-end="551">The shipping method you choose significantly affects costs and delivery time.</p><ul data-start="553" data-end="1380"><li data-start="553" data-end="887"><p data-start="555" data-end="573"><strong data-start="555" data-end="570">Sea Freight</strong>:</p><ul data-start="576" data-end="887"><li data-start="576" data-end="662">The cheapest option for bulk cargo, heavy goods, and industrial shipments.</li><li data-start="665" data-end="749">Longer transit time (30-45 days) but ideal for cost-sensitive shipments.</li><li data-start="752" data-end="887">FCL (Full Container Load) is more economical for large shipments, while LCL (Less than Container Load) suits smaller cargo.</li></ul></li><li data-start="889" data-end="1102"><p data-start="891" data-end="909"><strong data-start="891" data-end="906">Air Freight</strong>:</p><ul data-start="912" data-end="1102"><li data-start="912" data-end="985">The fastest method (3-7 days), but higher per-kilogram rates.</li><li data-start="988" data-end="1102">Best for urgent, high-value, and lightweight goods, such as electronics, fashion, and pharmaceuticals.</li></ul></li><li data-start="1104" data-end="1380"><p data-start="1106" data-end="1140"><strong data-start="1106" data-end="1137">DDP (Door-to-Door) Shipping</strong>:</p><ul data-start="1143" data-end="1380"><li data-start="1143" data-end="1253">A fully managed logistics solution that covers freight, customs clearance, and last-mile delivery.</li><li data-start="1256" data-end="1380">Costs vary depending on whether air or sea freight is used, but it simplifies the import process for businesses.</li></ul></li></ul><h4 data-start="1387" data-end="1454"><strong data-start="1391" data-end="1452">Cargo Weight and Volume: Understanding Freight Pricing</strong></h4><p data-start="1455" data-end="1503">Shipping costs are determined based on either:</p><ul data-start="1505" data-end="1610"><li data-start="1505" data-end="1547"><strong data-start="1507" data-end="1545">Actual weight (gross weight in kg)</strong></li><li data-start="1548" data-end="1610"><strong data-start="1550" data-end="1608">Volumetric weight (size-based pricing for bulky cargo)</strong></li></ul><p data-start="1612" data-end="1885">For air freight, carriers calculate dimensional weight (volumetric weight) and charge the higher value between actual and volumetric weight. Bulky but lightweight shipments (e.g., textiles, furniture) may cost more than expected due to volumetric pricing.</p><p data-start="1887" data-end="1929">For <strong data-start="1891" data-end="1906">sea freight</strong>, pricing depends on:</p><ul data-start="1931" data-end="2106"><li data-start="1931" data-end="1988"><strong data-start="1933" data-end="1950">LCL shipments</strong>: Charged per cubic meter (CBM).</li><li data-start="1989" data-end="2106"><strong data-start="1991" data-end="2008">FCL shipments</strong>: Charged per 20ft or 40ft container, offering lower per-unit costs for large shipments.</li></ul><p data-start="2108" data-end="2224"><strong data-start="2108" data-end="2127">Cost-saving tip</strong>: Consolidate shipments to maximize container space and reduce per-unit shipping costs.</p><h4 data-start="2231" data-end="2309"><strong data-start="2235" data-end="2307">Port and Airport Selection: Direct Routes vs. Transshipment Costs</strong></h4><p data-start="2310" data-end="2415">Shipping costs vary based on the port of departure in China and the port of arrival in Morocco.</p><ul data-start="2417" data-end="2950"><li data-start="2417" data-end="2671"><p data-start="2419" data-end="2445"><strong data-start="2419" data-end="2442">Main Moroccan ports</strong>:</p><ul data-start="2448" data-end="2671"><li data-start="2448" data-end="2523"><strong data-start="2450" data-end="2472">Port of Casablanca</strong> – Morocco’s largest port, handling most imports.</li><li data-start="2526" data-end="2598"><strong data-start="2528" data-end="2548">Tangier Med Port</strong> – A key trade hub connecting Africa and Europe.</li><li data-start="2601" data-end="2671"><strong data-start="2603" data-end="2618">Agadir Port</strong> – Specialized in agriculture and industrial cargo.</li></ul></li><li data-start="2673" data-end="2950"><p data-start="2675" data-end="2704"><strong data-start="2675" data-end="2701">Main Moroccan airports</strong>:</p><ul data-start="2707" data-end="2950"><li data-start="2707" data-end="2793"><strong data-start="2709" data-end="2762">Casablanca Mohammed V International Airport (CMN)</strong> – The primary air cargo hub.</li><li data-start="2796" data-end="2874"><strong data-start="2798" data-end="2836">Tangier Ibn Battouta Airport (TNG)</strong> – Handles regional cargo shipments.</li><li data-start="2877" data-end="2950"><strong data-start="2879" data-end="2913">Marrakech Menara Airport (RAK)</strong> – Limited cargo handling capacity.</li></ul></li></ul><p data-start="2952" data-end="3130">Shipping directly to Casablanca is often cheaper and faster than routing through Europe or the Middle East, as transshipment routes add extra costs and time delays.</p><h4 data-start="3137" data-end="3192"><strong data-start="3141" data-end="3190">Customs Duties and Import Taxes in Morocco</strong></h4><p data-start="3193" data-end="3307">Moroccan customs regulations affect total shipping costs through import duties, VAT, and clearance fees.</p><ul data-start="3309" data-end="3929"><li data-start="3309" data-end="3477"><p data-start="3311" data-end="3331"><strong data-start="3311" data-end="3328">Import Duties</strong>:</p><ul data-start="3334" data-end="3477"><li data-start="3334" data-end="3409">Varies depending on the Harmonized System (HS) Code of the product.</li><li data-start="3412" data-end="3477">Some products have lower tariffs due to trade agreements.</li></ul></li><li data-start="3479" data-end="3671"><p data-start="3481" data-end="3509"><strong data-start="3481" data-end="3506">Value-Added Tax (VAT)</strong>:</p><ul data-start="3512" data-end="3671"><li data-start="3512" data-end="3573">Standard VAT rate is 20%, applicable to most imports.</li><li data-start="3576" data-end="3671">Some goods, such as pharmaceuticals and essential products, may have reduced VAT rates.</li></ul></li><li data-start="3673" data-end="3929"><p data-start="3675" data-end="3704"><strong data-start="3675" data-end="3701">Customs Clearance Fees</strong>:</p><ul data-start="3707" data-end="3929"><li data-start="3707" data-end="3839">Importers must provide correct documentation (commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading/airway bill) to avoid delays.</li><li data-start="3842" data-end="3929">Incorrect paperwork can lead to penalties, storage fees, and shipment hold-ups.</li></ul></li></ul><p data-start="3931" data-end="4086"><strong data-start="3931" data-end="3950">Cost-saving tip</strong>: Work with an experienced freight forwarder to ensure accurate documentation and compliance with Moroccan import regulations.</p><h4 data-start="4093" data-end="4151"><strong data-start="4097" data-end="4149">Seasonal Demand and Freight Rate Fluctuations</strong></h4><p data-start="4152" data-end="4217">Shipping costs tend to rise during peak seasons, including:</p><ul data-start="4219" data-end="4609"><li data-start="4219" data-end="4342"><strong data-start="4221" data-end="4247">Ramadan & Eid Holidays</strong> – Increased demand for food, clothing, and consumer goods leads to higher freight rates.</li><li data-start="4343" data-end="4470"><strong data-start="4345" data-end="4371">Christmas and New Year</strong> – Imports of electronics and retail goods surge, affecting air and sea freight availability.</li><li data-start="4471" data-end="4609"><strong data-start="4473" data-end="4512">Chinese New Year (January-February)</strong> – Factory closures in China cause shipment backlogs, leading to higher shipping costs.</li></ul><p data-start="4611" data-end="4719">Booking shipments ahead of peak seasons can help secure lower rates and avoid space shortages.</p><h4 data-start="4726" data-end="4783"><strong data-start="4730" data-end="4781">Fuel Surcharges and Global Market Conditions</strong></h4><ul data-start="4784" data-end="5113"><li data-start="4784" data-end="4869">Fluctuations in oil prices impact both air freight and sea freight rates.</li><li data-start="4870" data-end="5010">Bunker fuel surcharges are added to ocean freight invoices, while airlines adjust freight rates based on fuel price changes.</li><li data-start="5011" data-end="5113">Economic conditions, trade policies, and carrier capacity constraints can also affect pricing.</li></ul><p data-start="5115" data-end="5212"><strong data-start="5115" data-end="5134">Cost-saving tip</strong>: Monitor freight rate trends and book in advance when prices are lower.</p><h4 data-start="5219" data-end="5280"><strong data-start="5223" data-end="5278">How to Reduce Shipping Costs from China to Morocco?</strong></h4><ol data-start="5282" data-end="5990"><li data-start="5282" data-end="5421"><strong data-start="5285" data-end="5313">Optimize Shipping Method</strong> – Use FCL for bulk shipments to reduce per-unit costs, and only use air freight for urgent cargo.</li><li data-start="5422" data-end="5540"><strong data-start="5425" data-end="5449">Choose Direct Routes</strong> – Avoid transshipment when possible to minimize delays and additional handling fees.</li><li data-start="5541" data-end="5673"><strong data-start="5544" data-end="5568">Plan Shipments Early</strong> – Booking before peak seasons helps secure better pricing and prevents last-minute rate hikes.</li><li data-start="5674" data-end="5836"><strong data-start="5677" data-end="5719">Work with a Reliable Freight Forwarder</strong> – A professional forwarder can negotiate lower rates, streamline customs clearance, and consolidate shipments.</li><li data-start="5837" data-end="5990"><strong data-start="5840" data-end="5873">Ensure Accurate Documentation</strong> – Avoid customs delays and penalties by ensuring HS codes, invoices, and packing lists are correctly prepared.</li></ol><p data-start="5997" data-end="6192">By understanding these cost-influencing factors, businesses can effectively plan shipments, reduce expenses, and improve supply chain efficiency when shipping from China to Morocco.</p><p data-start="6194" data-end="6356" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Would you like assistance in securing the best freight rates or need a customized shipping quote? Let us help you optimize your logistics strategy! </p></div></div><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-8ec08f2 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="8ec08f2" data-element_type="container" data-e-type="container" data-settings="{"ekit_has_onepagescroll_dot":"yes"}"><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-d8f5035 elementor-widget elementor-widget-image" data-id="d8f5035" data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{"ekit_we_effect_on":"none"}" data-widget_type="image.default">

data-end="1952">Rates fluctuate due to global demand and carrier capacity.</li><li data-start="1956" data-end="2058">Peak seasons (before Ramadan, Black Friday, and Chinese New Year) often have higher rates.</li></ul></li><li data-start="2060" data-end="2313"><p data-start="2063" data-end="2087"><strong data-start="2063" data-end="2085">Port Handling Fees</strong></p><ul data-start="2091" data-end="2313">Casablanca, as the largest Moroccan port, generally has lower handling fees than smaller ports.</li></ul></li><li data-start="2315" data-end="2543"><p data-start="2318" data-end="2359"><strong data-start="2318" data-end="2357">Fuel Surcharges and Additional Fees</strong></p><ul data-start="2363" data-end="2543"><li data-start="2363" data-end="2446">Bunker fuel surcharges apply to ocean freight, impacting overall costs.</li><li data-start="2450" data-end="2543">Security fees and congestion surcharges may be added, depending on market conditions.</li></ul></li></ol><h4 data-start="2550" data-end="2614"><strong data-start="2554" data-end="2612">How to Reduce Sea Freight Costs from China to Morocco?</strong></h4><ul><li data-element_type="widget" data-e-type="widget" data-settings="{"ekit_we_effect_on":"none"}" data-widget_type="text-editor.default"><p data-start="73" data-end="343">Air freight is the fastest shipping option for transporting goods from China to Morocco, making it ideal for time-sensitive, high-value, and lightweight cargo. It is commonly used for electronics, pharmaceuticals, auto parts, fashion, and perishable goods.</p><p data-start="345" data-end="490">The primary cargo hub in Morocco is Casablanca Mohammed V This method is ideal for small businesses, e-commerce sellers, and companies without import licenses, as it eliminates the need for importers to handle customs paperwork or pay additional taxes upon but at a higher cost.</li></ul><p data-start="1344" data-end="1362">For convenience:</p><ul data-start="1363" data-end="1656"><li data-start="1363" data-end="1532">DDP shipping is the best option for data-start="1903" data-end="1965">Plan shipments in advance to avoid peak season surcharges.</li><li data-start="1966" data-end="2059">Work with a reliable freight forwarder to ensure smooth transit By implementing cost-saving strategies, businesses can minimize expenses while maintaining efficient delivery times. Below are the most effective ways to reduce shipping costs.</p><h4 data-start="359" data-end="419"><strong data-start="364" data-end="417">Consolidate Shipments to Reduce Per-Unit Costs</strong></h4><ul data-start="420" data-end="744"><li data-start="420" data-end="511">Larger shipments benefit from economies of scale, reducing per-unit shipping costs.</li><li data-start="512" data-end="637">If shipping small volumes, consider LCL (Less than Container Load) consolidation instead of multiple small shipments.</li><li data-start="638" data-end="744">Combining orders from different suppliers into one full container load (FCL) lowers overall costs.</li></ul><h4 data-start="746" data-end="818"><strong data-start="751" data-end="816">Choose the Right Shipping Method Based on Cost and Urgency</strong></h4><ul data-start="819" data-end="1190"><li data-start="819" data-end="918">Sea freight is the most cost-effective option for bulk shipments and non-urgent deliveries.</li><li data-start="919" data-end="1026">Air freight should only be used for urgent, high-value goods, as it is more expensive per kilogram.</li><li data-start="1027" data-end="1190">DDP shipping is ideal for e-commerce and small businesses needing an all-inclusive logistics service but should be compared to traditional freight options.</li></ul><h4 data-start="1192" data-end="1263"><strong data-start="1197" data-end="1261">Plan Shipments in Advance to Avoid Peak Season Surcharges</strong></h4><ul data-start="1264" data-end="1713"><li data-start="1264" data-end="1610">Shipping costs increase during peak seasons such as:<br><ul data-start="1327" data-end="1610"><li data-start="1327" data-end="1416"><strong data-start="1329" data-end="1349">Chinese New Year</strong> (January-February) – Factory closures cause supply chain delays.</li><li data-start="1419" data-end="1512"><strong data-start="1421" data-end="1449">Ramadan and Eid Holidays</strong> – Higher demand in Morocco leads to increased freight rates.</li><li data-start="1515" data-end="1610"><strong data-start="1517" data-end="1547">Black Friday and Christmas</strong> – Global e-commerce demand spikes air and sea freight costs.</li></ul></li><li data-start="1611" data-end="1713">Booking shipments <strong data-start="1631" data-end="1653">before peak season</strong> secures lower rates 		.tl-final-guides,

			padding: 68px 24px 44px;

					transparent 29%

				linear-gradient(
					180deg,
					#ffffff 0%,
					#f8fafe 100%
				);
			font-family: inherit;
			overflow: hidden;
		}

		.tl-final-guides__inner {
			width: 100%;
			max-width: 1320px;
			margin: 0 auto;
		}

		/* Header */

		.tl-final-guides__header {
			max-width: 760px;
			margin: 0 0 32px;
		}

		.tl-final-guides__eyebrow {
			display: block;
			margin: 0 0 10px;
			color: #bd8921;
			font-size: 11px;
			font-weight: 800;
			line-height: 1.4;
			letter-spacing: 0.2em;
			text-transform: uppercase;
		}

		.tl-final-guides__header h2 {
			margin: 0;
			color: #0b1d3b;
			font-size: clamp(31px, 3vw, 42px);
			font-weight: 750;
			line-height: 1.15;
			letter-spacing: -0.035em;
		}

		.tl-final-guides__header p {
			max-width: 670px;
			margin: 12px 0 0;
			color: #677389;
			font-size: 15px;
			line-height: 1.7;
		}

		/* Grid */

		.tl-final-guides__grid {
			display: grid;
			grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
			align-items: stretch;
			gap: 22px;
		}

		/* Card */

		.tl-final-card {
			position: relative;
			display: flex;
			min-width: 0;
			min-height: 365px;
			flex-direction: column;
			border: 1px solid rgba(13, 35, 70, 0.08);
			border-radius: 18px;
			background: #ffffff;
			box-shadow:
				0 10px 28px rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.055),
				0 2px 8px rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.025);
			overflow: hidden;
			transition:
				transform 0.3s ease,
				box-shadow 0.3s ease,
				border-color 0.3s ease;
		}

		.tl-final-card::after {
			position: absolute;
			right: 0;
			bottom: 0;
			left: 0;
			height: 3px;
			background: linear-gradient(
				90deg,
				#c7962d 0%,
				#e7c36a 47%,
				#234f99 100%
			);
			content: "";
			opacity: 0;
			transform: scaleX(0.45);
			transform-origin: center;
			transition:
				opacity 0.3s ease,
				transform 0.3s ease;
		}

		.tl-final-card:hover {
			border-color: rgba(30, 76, 150, 0.2);
			box-shadow:
				0 22px 48px rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.12),
				0 6px 16px rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.045);
			transform: translateY(-6px);
		}

		.tl-final-card:hover::after {
			opacity: 1;
			transform: scaleX(1);
		}

		/* Image */

		.tl-final-card__image-link {
			display: block;
			color: inherit;
			text-decoration: none;
		}

		.tl-final-card__image {
			position: relative;
			width: 100%;
			aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
			background: #edf2f8;
			overflow: hidden;
		}

		.tl-final-card__image::after {
			position: absolute;
			inset: 0;
			background: linear-gradient(
				180deg,
				rgba(6, 20, 45, 0.01) 58%,
				rgba(6, 20, 45, 0.09) 100%
			);
			content: "";
			pointer-events: none;
		}

		.tl-final-card__thumbnail {
			display: block;
			width: 100%;
			height: 100%;
			margin: 0;
			object-fit: cover;
			object-position: center center;
			transition: transform 0.5s ease;
		}

		.tl-final-card:hover .tl-final-card__thumbnail {
			transform: scale(1.035);
		}

		.tl-final-card__placeholder {
			display: flex;
			width: 100%;
			height: 100%;
			align-items: center;
			justify-content: center;
			flex-direction: column;
			gap: 7px;
			background:
				radial-gradient(
					circle at 80% 20%,
					rgba(201, 156, 56, 0.25),
					transparent 30%
				),
				linear-gradient(
					135deg,
					#0b1d3b 0%,
					#244d91 100%
				);

		}

		.tl-final-card__placeholder span {
			font-size: 10px;
			font-weight: 800;
			line-height: 1.4;
			letter-spacing: 0.2em;
		}

		.tl-final-card__placeholder strong {
			font-size: 19px;
			font-weight: 700;
			line-height: 1.3;
		}

		/* Card content */

		.tl-final-card__content {
			display: flex;
			flex: 1;
			flex-direction: column;
			padding: 20px 21px 22px;
		}

		.tl-final-card__meta {
			display: flex;
			align-items: center;
			flex-wrap: wrap;
			gap: 8px;
			margin: 0 0 11px;
			color: #8490a3;
			font-size: 10px;
			font-weight: 600;
			line-height: 1.5;

		.tl-final-card__dot {

		.tl-final-card__title {
			margin: 0;
			font-size: 18px;
			font-weight: 750;
			line-height: 1.42;
			letter-spacing: -0.015em;
		}

		.tl-final-card__title a {
			display: -webkit-box;
			color: #101c34;
			text-decoration: none;
			overflow: hidden;
			transition: color 0.25s ease;
			-webkit-box-orient: vertical;
			-webkit-line-clamp: 3;
		}

		.tl-final-card:hover .tl-final-card__title a,
		.tl-final-card__title a:focus-visible {
			color: #1d4f9c;
		}

		.tl-final-card__read-more {
			display: inline-flex;
			width: fit-content;
			align-items: center;
			gap: 7px;
			margin-top: auto;
			padding-top: 18px;
			color: #173d7b;
			font-size: 12px;
			font-weight: 750;
			line-height: 1.4;
			text-decoration: none;
			transition:
				gap 0.25s ease,
				color 0.25s ease;
		}

		.tl-final-card__read-more:hover,
		.tl-final-card__read-more:focus-visible {
			gap: 11px;
			color: #b9851f;
		}

		/* Archive button */

		.tl-final-guides__button-row {
			display: flex;
			justify-content: center;
			margin-top: 32px;
		}

		.tl-final-guides__button {
			position: relative;
			z-index: 2;
			display: inline-flex;
			min-height: 46px;
			align-items: center;
			justify-content: center;
			gap: 9px;
			padding: 11px 23px;
			border: 1px solid rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.17);
			border-radius: 999px;
			background: #ffffff;
			box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.035);
			color: #0b1d3b;
			font-size: 12px;
			font-weight: 750;
			line-height: 1.4;
			text-decoration: none;
			pointer-events: auto;
			transition:
				gap 0.25s ease,
				color 0.25s ease,
				background 0.25s ease,
				border-color 0.25s ease,
				transform 0.25s ease,
				box-shadow 0.25s ease;
		}

		.tl-final-guides__button:hover,
		.tl-final-guides__button:focus-visible {
			gap: 12px;
			border-color: #0b1d3b;
			background: #0b1d3b;
			box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.16);
			color: #ffffff;
			transform: translateY(-2px);
		}

		.tl-final-guides__empty {
			margin: 0;
			padding: 30px;
			border: 1px solid rgba(11, 29, 59, 0.08);
			border-radius: 16px;
			background: #ffffff;
			color: #677389;
			text-align: center;
		}

		/* Tablet */

		@media (max-width: 1180px) {

		/* Mobile */

		@media (max-width: 767px) {

				margin-top: 26px;
			}

			.tl-final-guides__button {
				width: 100%;
				max-width: 360px;

		}

		/* Accessibility */

		.tl-final-guides a:focus-visible {
